title: Connecting Smart Things: An IoT Ecosystem Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the end-to-end process of how data flows from a physical sensor/device through the IoT ecosystem to a user application and back.
relationships: Sensors collect and actuators perform physical actions
Raw data is transmitted to a Gateway via short-range protocols (e.g., Bluetooth, Zigbee)
Gateway aggregates and sends data to the Cloud via long-range protocols (e.g., Wi-Fi, Cellular)
Cloud platform stores, processes, and analyzes the data
Processed information is delivered to a User Application for monitoring/control
User commands are sent back through the cloud and gateway to actuate a device
